law: Plugin scanner must enumerate <plugin>/skills/SKILL.md and emit namespaced ids; MC-SA-02 fix
Audit unifier merger INPUTS before blaming merge logic on missing items
Pre-compact vault dump fires async on first CONTEXT WARNING via gsd-context-monitor.js spawn; /compact remains user-typed (UI command, hooks cannot dispatch slash commands)

Any /compact MUST be preceded by pre_compact_vault_dump.py — context purge below 65% used (35% remaining) without a sleepy-index pointer is forbidden. Snowball: future sessions cite this row instead of re-discussing context-management policy.

Workspace topology is immutable: any layout change must be backed by a Topology Engine artifact (vault/topology/lazarus_layout_*.json) AND a topology_apply.py --dry-run that resolves all macro slots to concrete paths. Live application is fenced behind --i-have-no-open-windows + 0 detected Cursor processes; otherwise refuse to clobber.
